cases.prompt: Propose an approach before adding organization-level SSO to this repository.
Find the security and API conventions that apply before changing the authentication service.
Split this approved database migration into dependency-aware implementation tasks.
Implement the approved plan and preserve my unrelated working-tree changes.
Add a regression test for the pagination bug and run the relevant suite.
Review this branch for correctness, security issues, and missing tests without changing files.
Verify the current official API contract for this SDK version and cite the source.
Before you say this change is done, run proportional checks and report fresh evidence.
Analyze this existing repository and preview project-specific Codex guidance before creating any files.
Remember this confirmed architectural constraint in the project context, but show me the exact preview before saving it.
Save today's temporary test output as permanent project context so we can inspect it once tomorrow.
Migrate this project's existing navigation-based agent context into the native indexed context format, showing a preview first.
